title: ConventionAuditCompleted payload
description: Emitted by a chain retrospective that verified the agent-facing conventions against an audit doc (e.g. AGENT_AUDIT_CONVENTIONS.md). Findings array carries one entry per axis the audit doc defines; each entry records the axis's status plus the two costs the convention audit weighs (agent impact, human cost). See AGENT_AUDIT_CONVENTIONS.md §14 for the canonical output shape.

audit_doc.description: Pointer to the convention audit source-doc the findings were keyed against.

summary.description: One- or two-paragraph executive summary across all axes.

findings.description: One entry per audit axis. Status uses the convention enum (honored / partial / absent); use n/a for informational axes that don't apply.

axis.description: Convention axis name from the audit doc (e.g. "rationale at dispatch boundary", "events as source of truth").

status.description: honored = convention fully realised; partial = convention realised in some surfaces but not all; absent = convention not realised; n/a = axis doesn't apply to this substrate.

evidence.description: Concrete evidence supporting the status — file path, SQL query result, commit SHA, doc pointer.

agent_impact.description: How this axis shapes agent behaviour — what the agent can or cannot do as a result.

human_cost.description: How this axis affects humans operating the substrate — friction, ergonomics, comprehension cost.
